For the remaining exercises, label the structures accordingly. (1 point) Name of a structure is directional term to Name of the second structure retina* is posterior to lens* middle nasal conchae is superior to is inferior to cribriform plate cornea is anterior to is distal to tympanic membrane medial rectus is medial to is lateral to tongue HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 67
